description: Find and correct errors in ledger postings
endpoints: GET /ledger/posting — list postings (params: dateFrom, dateTo, accountNumberFrom, accountNumberTo)
common_errors: Use generic_api_call with GET /ledger/voucher or GET /ledger/posting to find errors
Corrective vouchers should be dated on the last day of the error period
tips: CRITICAL: The prompt tells you EXACTLY what the errors are (wrong account, duplicate, missing VAT, wrong amount). Parse all errors from the prompt. For EACH error, create ONE corrective voucher using create_voucher. Wrong account: debit correct account, credit wrong account. Duplicate: reverse the duplicate. Missing VAT: add the VAT posting. Wrong amount: post the difference. If the original posting is on a supplier/customer control account, preserve the same supplierId/customerId on the corrective voucher posting. Use generic_api_call to GET /ledger/voucher?dateFrom=2026-01-01&dateTo=2026-02-28 to verify.
